g.text: Evaluate watering schedule based on species, environment, and last log
Determine specific plant is due for watering
Deliver notification after quiet hours end
Send watering reminder notification to device
Open app directly to "Needs Attention" dashboard
Display specific plant(s) requiring water and instructions
Log watering event with current timestamp
Calculate and schedule next future reminder
Hide reminder and reschedule for selected time
Select whether to send request to Customer Support
